questions.question: What happens when you mutate a frozen reactive object in non-strict mode?
options: Vue throws a warning and re-renders
The mutation silently fails, no re-render

questions.question: Why can't Vue make frozen objects reactive?
options: Proxy doesn't support frozen objects at all
Object.freeze sets writable:false, blocking the Proxy set trap

questions.question: When is Object.freeze() on reactive data useful?
options: As a performance optimization for large read-only datasets
